_comment: Synthetic-iPad-shaped fixture (not the real iPad curve). To export the real iPad curve from the LXC DB, run: pnpm exec tsx scripts/fixtures/export-reference-curve.ts --profile-id 4 --out src/modules/charging/fixtures/ipad-reference-curve.json (requires LXC DB access). Per W2 / Assumption A4, the real-curve export is OPTIONAL and deferred until LXC access is available.
